laws.final_recommended_action: Record the repeal as history only and ensure any linked repeal marker is correct.

laws.title: Public Law 36-256 | Commerce Dispersal Act

laws.final_recommended_action: Insert the transfer note at 2 U.S.C. 142e.

laws.title: Public Law 36-257 | Maritime Operations & Policy Overhaul Act

exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Amend Streamlining and Protecting American Security Act sec. 6(m) as directed in SEC. 4.
Amend Military Officer Commissioning Reform Act sec. 9(g) as directed in SEC. 5.
Amend Military Justice Reform Act of 2024 sec. 4(a) as directed in SEC. 6.
Treat SECS. 7-12 as operational transfer/note material.

audit/chronology-report.json keeps the act current and permanent.
Current branch coverage remains partial.
laws.current_xml_comparison: The current branch does not present a fully settled codification path, and origin/main does not resolve the missing amendments.
laws.final_recommended_action: Apply the three direct amendments and carry the rest as note/transfer material.
